title: Acute Midbrain Slice Preparation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"qahps","text":"This protocol describes preparation of 250 μm horizontal midbrain slices containing the VTA using chilled NMDG-based protective cutting solution, followed by graded sodium reintroduction and storage in HEPES-based aCSF prior to electrophysiological recording.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"qhdkt","text":"**NMDG-Based Cutting Solution (mM)**","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"v5f75","text":"92 NMDG, 2.5 KCl, 1.25 NaH2PO4, 30 NaHCO3, 20 HEPES, 25 glucose, 2 thiourea, 5 Na-ascorbate, 3 Na-pyruvate, 0.5 CaCl2, 10 MgSO4. Equilibrate with 95% O2 - 5% CO2, pH 7.3. Keep chilled.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4pfkm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gdfpf","text":"**HEPES-Based Storage Solution (mM)**","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"93gbz","text":"92 NaCl, 2.5 KCl, 1.25 NaH2PO4, 30 NaHCO3, 20 HEPES, 25 glucose, 2 thiourea, 5 Na-ascorbate, 3 Na-pyruvate, 2 CaCl2, 2 MgSO4. Equilibrate with 95% O2 - 5% CO2, pH 7.3. Store at room temperature.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Anesthetize the mouse with halothane and decapitate rapidly.
Remove the brain and immediately place it into chilled carbogenated NMDG solution.
Mount the brain for horizontal slicing.
Cut 250 μm horizontal slices containing the midbrain using a vibratome.
Transfer slices to NMDG solution at 33.0 C and incubate for 15 min.
Gradually reintroduce sodium by adding increasing volumes of 2 M NaCl solution every 5 min for 40 min total.
Transfer slices to HEPES-based aCSF at room temperature.
Allow at least 1 h recovery before recording.
creator: Cristian González-Cabrera
